title: Zaslawye Heavy Rain
lead: Zaslawye experiences extreme heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.03. This event is deemed critical with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Zaslawye has resulted in a significant increase in humidity, reaching 87%. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 16.2 km/h, but the rain's impact is substantial. 
 The HDD value of 11.6 GG indicates a notable cooling effect, while CDD remains at 0.0 GG, suggesting minimal heating demand.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately due to the critical nature of the event.
